title: Productionize Grok proxy and integrate into congress

log.context: Productionize Grok proxy and integrate into congress

Done. Here is a summary of everything completed:

**Part 1: Grok Proxy Productionized**

- Enabled and started the service (auto-restarts on failure with 5s delay)
- Updated `/mnt/data/ccr/proxy.py` to pass through any `grok-*` model name directly to xAI instead of falling back to `grok-3` for unknown models. This covers all 8 persona models: `grok-3-mini`, `grok-4.20-0309-re...(truncated)
